PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('each')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetAnonymousBlockImpl(ANONYMOUS_BLOCK)
      PsiPuppetPipedParametersListBlockImpl(PIPED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(|)('|')
        PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')
        PsiElement(|)('|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('each')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetAnonymousBlockImpl(ANONYMOUS_BLOCK)
      PsiPuppetPipedParametersListBlockImpl(PIPED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(|)('|')
        PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('j')
        PsiElement(|)('|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('j')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')

            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')

      PsiElement(()('(')

        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
      PsiElement())(')')

          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER

            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')
        PsiElement(|)('|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')

        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')

    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('each')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
    PsiElement({)('{')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
      PsiErrorElement:'(', '=>', CONSUMES or PRODUCES expected, got '"This is restricted:...'
        <empty list>
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
        PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"This is restricted: must have pipes!"')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('each')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetAnonymousBlockImpl(ANONYMOUS_BLOCK)
      PsiPuppetPipedParametersListBlockImpl(PIPED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(|)('|')
        PsiElement(|)('|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"No parameters are like this"')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('each')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionRelationImpl(EXPRESSION_RELATION)
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiErrorElement:'!=', '!~', '%', '*', '+', '-', '.', '/', <, <<, <=, '==', '=~', '>', '>=', '>>', '[', and, in or or expected, got '|'
        PsiElement(|)('|')
  PsiPuppetExpressionRelationImpl(EXPRESSION_RELATION)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')
    PsiErrorElement:'!=', '!~', '%', '*', '+', '-', '.', '/', <, <<, <=, '==', '=~', '>', '>=', '>>', '[', and, in or or expected, got '|'
      PsiElement(|)('|')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
    PsiElement({)('{')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
      PsiErrorElement:'(', '=>', CONSUMES or PRODUCES expected, got '"This is restricted:...'
        <empty list>
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
        PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"This is restricted: calls must have parentheses"')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('each')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetAnonymousBlockImpl(ANONYMOUS_BLOCK)
      PsiPuppetPipedParametersListBlockImpl(PIPED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(|)('|')
        PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('i')
        PsiElement(|)('|')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
          PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('myClass')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement({)('{')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
            PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"This is restricted since only statements are allowed inside"')
            PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
            PsiElement(})('}')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        Puppet: INCLUDE_CLASS_STATEMENT
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('include')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('myClass')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
        PsiElement(})('}')
